title: Support combined wire declaration and continuous assignment with struct

features.name: combined wire declaration and continuous assignment with struct type
features.description: Code should include a combined wire declaration and continuous assignment using a struct type

features.name: struct typed wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with a struct type definition
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] addr; logic [15:0] data; logic enable; } my_struct_t;
wire my_struct_t my_wire_struct;

features.name: continuous assignment with struct type casting in assign statement
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment statement with explicit struct type casting
